stemHtml: During take-off, the front probe of an EPR system becomes blocked by ingested debris or icing but the rear probe remains unaffected. The displayed EPR will likely be…

options.a: equal to zero, and N<sub>1 </sub>should be used instead.
options.b: lower than the actual EPR value.
options.c: higher than the actual EPR value.
options.d: equal to the LP turbine exhaust pressure.
